pName: Issue #284 — End date on last day of week
pNotes: Before the fix, tasks ending on the last day of the week (e.g. Sunday with Mon-first) would cause an extra empty week to be rendered. The chart should end cleanly at 2020-02-23.

pName: Ends mid-week (Wed 2020-02-19) — chart advances to Sun
Ends on Sunday 2020-02-23 — should NOT add extra week (bug #284)
pNotes: This task ends on Sunday. Before the fix an empty 8th week was rendered after this date.

pName: Ends on Sunday via planEnd 2020-02-23 (planEnd drives maxDate)
pNotes: planEnd also on Sunday — same boundary condition applies.
